user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view candidates whose offers can be cancelled in a list with all candidate details, so that I can identify offers to cancel
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Cancel Offer screen; When the list loads; Then candidates in the offer-accepted stage are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to search candidates by name, so that I can locate a specific offer to cancel
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Cancel Offer screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to refresh the list, so that I see current cancel-offer records
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Cancel Offer screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to switch between hiring stage filters, so that I can navigate the pipeline while managing offer cancellations
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Cancel Offer screen; When I select a stage filter button; Then the list updates to that stage with its candidate count
